features.name: fdisplay reads non-blocking assigned variable in same always block
features.description: Code should include a $fdisplay system task that reads a variable which is non-blocking-assigned within the same always @(posedge clock) block, causing the file output to show repeated values while waveforms remain correct

features.name: fdisplay with format specifier and integer variable
features.description: Code should include a $fdisplay call with multiple format specifiers (%04X, %02X, %d) writing to a file opened with $fopen, where one format argument is an incrementing counter variable
